resources.string: No events found in the "Todo" calendar
Persistent ongoing todo list synced from your DAVx5 "Todo" calendar
No events in the "Todo" calendar. Manage todos in your CalDAV app.
This app shows your DAVx5 "Todo" calendar events as a persistent notification that can\'t be swiped away. Please grant notification permission.
Notification permission denied. Todos won\'t appear as a persistent notification.
This app reads events from your DAVx5-synced "Todo" calendar to display them as a persistent notification. No data is written — the app is read-only.
Calendar permission denied. Cannot read the "Todo" calendar.
